_comment: Per-tier token pricing in USD per 1,000,000 tokens. This file is the single source of truth for pricing across the dashboard, hook, and installer. It is refreshed automatically by .github/workflows/update-pricing.yml (which scrapes Anthropic's published pricing). If the scrape breaks, the workflow fails (notifying maintainers) and these last-good values stay in effect. cache_read is ~0.1x input and cache_create is ~1.25x input by Anthropic's standard prompt-caching pricing.
